# Eric McLean, TCEL

> Strategy and transformation for the CEOs of complex, multi-business groups in the Gulf and EMEA. One clear, measurable strategy on OGSM and Strategy Maps, and the operating discipline to deliver it.

Eric McLean is a senior strategy and transformation consultant. He works alongside the CEO of a complex group as a peer who has actually run businesses: forty years of hands-on leadership across finance, technology and telecommunications, with real delivery on the ground in Qatar, the UAE and Oman. TCEL is The Consulting and Education Link.

## What he does

- Set the strategy: build one strategy the whole group can act on, using OGSM (Objectives, Goals, Strategies, Measures) and Strategy Maps so every business ladders up to the group's.
- Execute the change: governance, alignment and an operating rhythm that turn the plan into quarterly progress.
- Build the capability: workshops, organisational development and management education so the client's own people run the discipline. The same capability transfer behind the Qatarisation and Omanisation programmes he has led.
- Interim and fractional leadership: fractional CEO or COO through a transition, alongside the strategy work.
- AI inside strategy: deciding where AI genuinely creates advantage and building it into the plan, rather than adopting tools in search of a purpose.

## Frameworks and tools

OGSM, Strategy Maps, Balanced Scorecard, portfolio and capital allocation, scenario planning, operating model design, change and governance.

## Regions

Qatar, United Arab Emirates, Oman, the wider Gulf, EMEA and Asia.

## Pages

- Homepage: https://www.tcel.com/
- Insights (briefs on strategy, AI, leadership and growth): https://www.tcel.com/insights

Insights briefs are answer-first pieces titled as real questions, published roughly every fortnight. Individual signed-off briefs will be linked here as they go live.
